title: Add CSS for segmented scope control (radio pills styled as buttons)
description: Add CSS styles for the segmented scope control (radio group styled as pill buttons). Three options: Withdrawals, Deposits, Both. Active state should be visually distinct. Include responsive styles. The scope selector uses <input type='radio'> with name='categorization-scope' and values 'withdrawals', 'deposits', 'both'.
notes: Segmented control pattern: radio inputs hidden, labels styled as connected buttons. Active pill has filled background. Default selection: withdrawals.
